hidden_constraints.oracle_response: The root is a map where keys are namespace names. Each namespace value is a map containing a 'trans' map (with 'translcate' verbs and 'tunc' arrays for plural keys) and a '_data' array at the same level.

context_pointers.vague_reference: merge active and fallback keys with active overriding and nested merging
context_pointers.actual_meaning: Deep recursive merge of two JSON objects where 'active' overrides 'fallback' at every level, flattening nested dictionaries into a single associative structure before output.

oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature1_flat_catalog_loading.json.description: Loads a single translation catalog and reports the selected catalog identifier, parsed format, and nested entries.

feature2_fallback_deep_merge.json.description: Merges a fallback catalog with the active catalog so active leaf values override fallback leaves while missing fallback leaves remain available.

feature3_namespaced_catalog_loading.json.description: Loads one or more named catalog groups and preserves each group under its own top-level namespace.

feature4_namespace_validation.json.description: Rejects missing or empty namespace lists before attempting to load grouped catalogs.

feature5_remote_catalog_loading.json.description: Loads a catalog through a remote-source loader and decodes the returned content into the same map output shape as local catalogs.

feature6_key_lookup.json.description: Looks up dotted keys in a decoded catalog, returns string leaves, and reports missing-key callbacks without replacing missing values with booleans.

feature7_submap_calculation.json.description: Calculates the parent map used for a nested lookup and returns an empty map when the path is empty or crosses a non-map value.

feature8_plural_lookup.json.description: Selects the pluralized translation key whose numeric suffix matches the requested count as exercised by translated text rendering.

feature9_widget_text_rendering.json.description: Renders translated text widgets using loaded catalog values and leaves object-valued keys visible as their requested key or fallback key.

_constraints.output_rule: Output format must start with 'map=' followed by a pretty-printed JSON block.
Set 'fileName' to 'en' and 'extension' to 'json'.
Set 'fileName' to 'en' and 'extension' to 'yaml'.
Set 'fileName' to 'en_US' (explicitly replacing 'en').
Set 'fileName' to 'en'.
Set 'fileName' to 'en' (as per output definition in test case), 'extension' to 'json', merge active and fallback keys with active overriding and nested merging.
Output root must be a map where keys are namespace names. Each namespace value must be a sub-map containing its translation data plus metadata.
Set 'fileName' in each namespace sub-map to '<locale>/<country>' (e.g., 'en_US/<ns>').

_constraints.input_condition: input service sets 'namespaces' list is empty []
_constraints.output_rule: Output must revert to raw 'error=invalid_namespaces' with no JSON map.
Output must be a map containing exactly one top-level key: 'map'.
Output must consist of two lines: 'translation=<result>' and 'missing_keys=<json_array>'.

_constraints.input_condition: lookup key exists and resolves to a string
_constraints.output_rule: Set 'translation' to the found string value.

_constraints.input_condition: lookup key does not exist OR resolves to non-string value
_constraints.output_rule: Set 'translation' to null, set 'missing_keys' to a JSON array containing the requested key path (dot-separated).
Output must be 'submap=<pretty printed json>' representing the intermediate map used to resolve the final key.

_constraints.input_condition: path contains non-map value OR path is empty
_constraints.output_rule: The output submap must be an empty JSON object '{}'.
Output must consist of two lines: 'translation=<selected value>' and 'missing_keys=<json_array>'.

_constraints.input_condition: count matches a known key suffix (e.g., count 1 for 'keyPlural-1')
_constraints.output_rule: Set 'translation' to the text value of the matching key.

_constraints.input_condition: count matches a known key suffix (e.g., count 2 for 'keyPlural-2')
_constraints.output_rule: Set 'translation' to the text value of the matching key.

_constraints.input_condition: count does not match any key suffix
_constraints.output_rule: Set 'translation' to null, set 'missing_keys' to a JSON array containing the base key.
Output must be 'visible_texts=<json_array>'.

_constraints.input_condition: widget value is a string literal
_constraints.output_rule: Include the literal string value in the array.

_constraints.input_condition: widget value is an object (nested key)
_constraints.output_rule: Include the object key path in the array.
Include plural key values in the array.
